# PerfectPrompt

> PerfectPrompt is a Chrome extension for better AI prompts.

PerfectPrompt helps users refine drafts, get prompt feedback, save reusable prompts, and start from templates inside leading AI chat apps.

- Canonical site: https://perfectprompt.hafzism.in/
- Product type: Chrome extension
- Source repository: https://github.com/hafzism/perfectprompt
- Download: https://perfectprompt.hafzism.in/perfectprompt-extension.zip
